Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2081 0 0}Do you usually get the limited or the standard edition? Or both? For me—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wait, we can talk about this later. First, let's go meet up with Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
